content_body:
Wow! What a place! We arrived late in the evening on Thursday. We loved the cabin when we walked in and took our time looking at everything. During our 4 days we enjoyed staying in the cabin admiring the view, shopped in Blue Ridge, ate at the Toccoa Riverside Restaurant and listened to some live music, did some horseback riding in Tennessee which was really great, took the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway, roasted marshmallows by the fire. It was everything we wanted to do. My favorite part was sitting in the porch swing with a cup of coffee and just taking the view in! Being from the flatlands of Florida, the view here is drastically beautiful and different! Thanks for a wonderful time and sharing your beautiful home.
FL
title: Admiring North Georgia's Mountain Views
